plugins.photosPermission: QuickBite needs gallery access so you can upload profile and food photos.

plugins.cameraPermission: QuickBite needs camera access so you can scan food barcodes.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: QuickBite needs your location so customers can track active deliveries.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: QuickBite needs your location so customers can track active deliveries.
